svg.title: Hamster idle-follow v2 (scripted)
svg.desc: V18 capsule-hand hamster idle, self-scripted "trusted scripted svg" for clawd-on-desk. Static hands behind body kept as-is. Breathing + cursor-following head look (geometry yaw/pitch warp, blush rigid-bound follow) are driven by the embedded ECMAScript engine — a faithful port of the confirmed idle-look-v2 tuner. Exposes window.__cloudlingSetPointer({x,y,inside}) (x/y in viewBox coords) and window.__clawdSetLowPowerPaused(paused). Default (no pointer) = front-facing rest identical to the static master. Pure paths + soft-lift filter, no image/gradient/fetch.

g.data-desc: hamster short tail, circle; resting at body center (behind belly)
